project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 4 non-functional requirements, 0 constraints, and 2 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: Our school clubs need an app to publish weekly meeting schedules.
Club leaders should create and update events.
Students should join events and receive reminder notifications.

non_functional_requirements.text: It should be easy to use for freshmen.
Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.
Who is allowed to cancel events?
Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.

open_questions.text: How should this quality requirement be measured: It should be easy to use for freshmen.?
How should this quality requirement be measured: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.?

follow_up_questions: How should this quality requirement be measured: It should be easy to use for freshmen.?
How should this quality requirement be measured: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.?
